character.name:
TRUE pixel art with OCTOPATH TRAVELER character sprite color 
palette and pixel detail level (HD-2D 16-bit JRPG style). 
STRICT FRONT-FACING POSE for 8-direction rotation.

POSE:
- SOUTH-FACING base sprite, body squared toward viewer
- Both hands raised in front of chest, palms cupping a small 
  hovering ash-orb between them
- Both shoulders parallel, head straight forward

PROPORTIONS:
- Gaunt humanoid figure, ~6-head ratio, very thin
- Tattered shroud creates a tall draped silhouette

FACE — SHROUDED MINIMALIST:
- DEEP HOOD shadow over the upper face
- Eyes are TINY DIM RED PINPRICKS visible inside the hood shadow
- NO mouth, NO nose — bony face barely visible inside shroud
- Skeletal jawline hint at the bottom of the face (subtle)

HAIR:
- No visible hair, only shroud and bony skull peek

BODY AND EQUIPMENT:
- Tattered ASH-GRAY ROBES draped over a gaunt body, multiple 
  layered fabric strips trailing
- Skeletal hands raised in front of chest, holding a small 
  SWIRLING ASH-ORB (dim red glow inside)
- Bone structure faintly visible through the shroud
- Robe edges are jagged and torn, no clean hem

COLOR PALETTE:
- Dim red ash-orb glow is the ONLY saturated accent
- Limited palette ~14 colors of ash gray, charcoal, dim red, 
  bone white hints

RENDERING STYLE:
- Single black outline, no anti-aliasing, sharp pixel edges
- Basic flat shading, NO smooth gradients

CLEAN OUTPUT — STRICT:
★ CLEAN SOLID COLOR SHAPES ONLY
★ Floating embers around shoulders are deliberate (clean pixel 
  shaped, not random)
★ NO random white specks, NO sparkles outside ember area
★ TRUE transparent PNG (alpha=0)
★ NO shadow on the ground
